_comment: Fixed test fixture for cross-language verification. AAD = listingId (32 bytes) only. Python crypto.py MUST decrypt using aad=bytes.fromhex(listingId[2:]) (no offerId). Derivation: X25519(ephSk, teePk) -> HKDF-SHA256(salt=ephPub||teePk, info='haggle-v1') -> XChaCha20-Poly1305(key, nonce, aad=listingId[32b]). See PLAN §3.5 (updated) and packages/crypto/test/roundtrip.test.ts.
